name: Indian Lamb in Yogurt Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 whole leg of lamb, partially boned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, blend GROUP A ingredients until smooth.
2. Transfer the blended mixture to a bowl and stir in yogurt (minus 3 tablespoons) until creamy and smooth.
3. Rub GROUP B spices all over the leg of lamb, inside the cavity, and between the bones.
4. Place the spiced lamb in a glass pan and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 24 hours.
5. Preheat oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat until hot but not smoking.
6. Add GROUP C spices to the hot oil and stir for a few seconds, then pour over the lamb.
7. Cover the pan and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 1.5 hours.
8. Remove foil and continue baking uncovered for an additional 45 minutes.
9. Sprinkle DECORATIONS over the lamb and return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Arrange DECORATIONS into a flower pattern on top of the lamb before serving.
